# Support

## Bugs & feature requests

Open an issue: [github.com/aiosend/aiosend-vscode/issues](https://github.com/aiosend/aiosend-vscode/issues)

## aiosend library questions

For questions about the aiosend Python library itself (not this extension), go to the main repo:
[github.com/vovchic17/aiosend](https://github.com/vovchic17/aiosend)

Or read the docs: [aiosend.readthedocs.io](https://aiosend.readthedocs.io/ru/stable/)

## Security vulnerabilities

Do **not** open a public issue. Email directly: **yap8572@gmail.com**

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the full policy.
